author: coordinator-1
authorized_by: maintainer issue #34 ruling 2026-07-13 ("Let's indeed go with B") — author a verdict-gen-compatible stdin adapter + pre-final reset-refreeze so the knull-v2 mechanical verdict (NULL) can be formally registered. Precedents: registry/corrections/rules-1-c/2-prefreeze-correction.json (IDENTICAL defect + resolution), registry/corrections/f1/1-prefreeze-correction.json (pre-signoff reset-refreeze), registry/corrections/a5-llm/1-posthoc-pin-erratum.json (rules the reset path UNLAWFUL exactly when final-phase runs exist — here none did: results-log/knull-v2.jsonl was ABSENT at reset time).
changes: pins.analysis_script SWAPPED to the stdin-conformant successor: path analysis/knull_v3.py (sha256 54528cd42485effd8a08c6472b7f1f1bff6074ad1b62cf24604b9a8dbedfa181) -> analysis/knull_v3_stdin.py (sha256 07ddde0b163debfd8537fe207113bc95a87ae3e399f02ec576de65b7d12d445b). pins.analysis_script.output_fields UNCHANGED (68 declared pointers, byte-identical), so every frozen verdict-rule/endpoint metric pointer resolves exactly as before.

NO OTHER FIELD CHANGED: the deltas vs the superseded frozen record are exactly four — /pins/analysis_script/path, /pins/analysis_script/sha256, /frozen_at (2026-07-13T15:09:36Z -> 2026-07-13T20:08:29Z), /frozen_sha256. status net-unchanged FROZEN; frozen_by net-unchanged coordinator-1. Endpoints, verdict_rules, design, kill text, extrapolation envelope, corpus/artifact/harness pins, budget, hypotheses: byte-identical.
defect: The pinned analysis_script analysis/knull_v3.py is a CLI-only tool: main() uses argparse with REQUIRED --records/--item-meta/--out and reads those files; it never reads stdin. verdict-gen.py runs the pinned script with NO argv and eligible records on STDIN, so argparse exits 2 -> verdict-gen raises ERR_P2_ANALYSIS. The automated verdict path could therefore NEVER execute the pin (identical to the rules-1-c defect). /pins/analysis_script is in verdict-gen's DESIGN_SCOPE_PREFIXES (un-amendable post-freeze), so the CLI pin permanently stranded the verdict path until this reset-refreeze.
kill_criterion_status: kill_criterion_verbatim, verdict_rules, and extrapolation_envelope_verbatim UNCHANGED byte-identical. Only the analysis I/O interface changed; the analysis STATISTICS are byte-identical (parity-proven below), so the mechanically-determined verdict (NULL / PASS-GENERIC, tost_equivalent=True) is unchanged by this correction.
legitimacy: Pre-final window OPEN: NO phase:final run existed in the honesty spine at reset time — results-log/knull-v2.jsonl was ABSENT (the GPU run occurred and produced merged records, but they were never ingested to results-log, so no final-phase log record existed); knull-v2 is not GNG-0-signed. Lawful per the f1 and rules-1-c pre-signoff/pre-final reset-refreeze precedents; the a5-llm posthoc-pin-erratum precedent rules the reset path UNLAWFUL only when final-phase runs exist — which they did not here.
parity_proof: Byte-identical analysis output proven TWICE. (1) collect_knull_to_log.py bodies -> knull_v3_stdin.py at BOTH cell and run granularity. (2) collector -> REAL tools/registry/log-append.py (36-body chain-verified log) -> verdict-gen's own eligible-select + canonical_dumps -> the adapter. ALL outputs sha256 ebcdade0…, byte-identical to the committed poc/knull/results-incoming/knull-v2-20260713/merged/analysis.json (CLI original over the merged files); tost_equivalent=True, superior/inferior False, all gates True -> NULL. The shared statistical machinery (SAP_SEED through end of selftest: all constants, Bootstrap/BCa, analyse, OUTPUT_FIELDS) is verified byte-identical to knull_v3.py; only the docstring and main() input-acquisition differ (adapter adds a small _fail helper). analyse() groups by (arm,cell,rung) and sorts each group by seed, so it is an order-invariant pure function of the record set (no float-reduction-order hazard).
pin_resolution_carryover: None to carry over: knull-v2 had no unresolved PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder at the superseded freeze d04e7364. harness_manifest and all corpus/artifact pins were MEASURED at the original freeze and are byte-identical in the refrozen record 2ba87b11.
why_not_correction_only: /pins/analysis_script is in verdict-gen.py's DESIGN_SCOPE_PREFIXES, so it is un-amendable post-freeze — an ops amendment is refused ERR_P2_DESIGN_AMEND. A design-scope pin change therefore requires a reset-refreeze, not an ops amendment.
